title: Robust Roasted Polish Shungiku Skewers
description: A comforting Polish dish featuring shungiku, grilled to perfection with a blend of herbs and spices, making it a great option for a chilly evening. This recipe is ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly and offers a unique cultural twist.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the shungiku to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shungiku onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the shungiku is tender and slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and squeeze with lemon juice.
Sprinkle with chopped fresh dill and serve hot.
